status_line: Mid-morning, April 23. CEO pitch is this afternoon — SHARPIE PDF confirmed on desk. SARAH just finished Run 73: output root clean at 13 files, director target list flagged for promotion. LA Galaxy closes Saturday — that's the loudest clock ticking. Macy's is overdue. Glossier outreach still unconfirmed at day 18. GUARDIAN remains the standing gap. Hold steady.
